title: Paste option in columns

posts.author: yun (yuneisy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m submiting this requets on behalf of a user

The user was saying that some time a go (3 months ago) they were able to copy external information and to use the right click option to pasted it in a column

I inform then this was not like that and offer workarounds like use the key board combo of ctrl+v they just request me to submit this to check if this can be “re added”

Hope this makes sense
